text.title: Laravel PHPUnit / Pest Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Feature test under tests/Feature/, extends Tests\\TestCase, uses RefreshDatabase + assertJsonPath
Unit test under tests/Unit/, extends PHPUnit\\Framework\\TestCase, no Laravel boot
Feature test that calls Queue::fake() BEFORE dispatching, then assertPushed(Job::class)
Http::fake([...]) BEFORE the action; use recorded cassettes for contract regressions
skip-this-methodology — use Laravel Dusk or Playwright

text.example: layer=http_endpoint → feature-vs-unit-boundary → Feature test with RefreshDatabase + Mail::fake() + assertJsonPath('data.status', 'pending').
